items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of the 'Third-party extension code review process' but lacks concrete evidence to confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear failure report. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and configuration process but do not provide any relevant checks or validations related to the specific scenario being tested. This leads to an inconclusive result as there is no direct evidence supporting the requirement satisfaction.
